system.description: Sacred tokens representing Saint George's holy zeal and righteous fury when facing monstrous enemies. The Holy Dragon Slayer starts each scenario with 1 Fervor Token and gains additional tokens whenever he suffers a wound. These tokens can be spent to grant allied Hunters additional wounds against visible monsters or provide defensive bonuses. When Saint George becomes an Opponent Dark Presence during a Witch Hunt, he gains Fervor Tokens equal to the number of Hunters, which he can use to inflict additional wounds or transform Hunter Position Checks into automatic failures.
system.location: Tracked by Saint George during combat
